a-simply-roast-turkey.name: A Simply Roast Turkey

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Place a rack in the lowest position of the oven.
Remove turkey neck and giblets; pat dry with paper towels. Place breast-side up, on a rack in a large roasting pan.
Loosely fill cavity with stuffing. Rub skin with butter; season with salt and pepper.
Pour 2 cups of turkey stock into the roasting pan.
Loosely tent turkey with aluminum foil; roast for 2 ½ hours, basting with pan juices every 30 minutes. When drippings evaporate, add remaining stock to the pan, 1 to 2 cups at a time.
Remove foil and continue roasting until a meat thermometer inserted in thickest part of thigh reads 74°C (75 degrees C), about 1 ½ hours more.
Let stand for 20 to 30 minutes before carving.

absinthes-golden-yogurt-cake.name: Absinthe's Golden Yogurt Cake

ingredients.prep: Meyer lemon, or orange zest, or a combination

ingredients.item: Plain drained yogurt or greek yogurt

instructions: Preheat an oven to 177°C. Butter the bottom and sides of a 9-inch round cake pan with 2-inch sides. Line the bottom with parchment paper and dust the sides with flour, shaking out the excess.
Sift together the flour and baking powder in a bowl.
In a bowl, whisk together the yogurt, oil, zest, vanilla, and salt.

In a stand mixer fitted with a whip, beat the eggs on medium speed until frothy and well blended. Add the sugar gradually. Raise the speed to medium-high and whip until the sugar dissolves and the mixture is thick and pale, stopping the machine to scrape down the sides of the bowl at least once. Lower the mixer speed and add the yogurt mixture gradually. Add the dry ingredients gradually and beat just until well blended.

Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan, spreading it evenly. Bake on a center rack until the surface is golden brown and firm to the touch and a toothpick comes out clean, about 40 minutes. Cool on a rack for 10 minutes, and then unmold and finish cooling, top side up, on the rack.
To make the yogurt cream: In a bowl, whisk together the yogurt, honey, and vanilla. Gently fold in the whipped cream.
Slice the cake into wedges to serve, topping each portion with a dollop of the yogurt cream, if desired.

acai-peanut-protein-shake.name: Acai-peanut Protein Shake
instructions: Blend açai purée, almond milk, strawberries, protein powder, and peanut butter in a blender until smooth. Serve immediately.

aguachile-recipe-comedera.name: Aguachile Recipe
instructions: Clean up the snap and put them up half and long (as a butter)
He licks cilantro, lemon, salt, pepper and half the chilies
Peel ion into thin cuts and mix with your blister's ready and cum into cubes
Add the shrimp and the other half minced chilies
Let go for an hour
Decorate with avocado

air-fryer-apple-crisp-with-oatmeal-streu.name: Air Fryer Apple Crisp With Oatmeal Streusel
instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Combine apples, brown sugar, butter, vanilla, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt in a bowl. Toss and stir until apples are coated.
Spray 4 individual-sized ramekins with nonstick cooking spray. Divide apple mixture evenly among all 4 ramekins. Cover with foil and air fry until apples are tender, about 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, make streusel in the same bowl by combining oats, flour, brown sugar, butter, cinnamon, and salt. Use your hands to combine streusel. Place in the refrigerator until ready to use.
Remove ramekins from the air fryer, divide streusel evenly on top of the apples, and air fry, uncovered, until streusel is a golden brown, 5 to 7 minutes.

air-fryer-baked-apple-teleculinaria.name: Air Fryer Baked Apple
instructions: Remove the lump from the apples with a proper tool and reserve.
Unroll the leafy dough, brush with the beaten egg and sprinkle with half the yellow sugar and clove.
Cut the dough into squares of 15 cm, have an apple in the center of each and place the ends of the dough inside the apple.
Stick a cinnamon stick in the center, brush around with more egg beaten and sprinkle with the remaining sugar and clove.
Put on air fryer and program 180oc for 25 minutes. If you like the golden apples, set another five minutes at 200 degrees. Serve sprinkled with powdered sugar.

air-fryer-ranch-stuffed-olives.name: Air Fryer Ranch-stuffed Olives
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Preheat an air fryer to 200 degrees C.'}

{'step': '2', 'description': 'Mix cream cheese and ranch powder in a bowl until evenly combined. Spoon mixture into a resealable plastic bag. Snip off a small corner with scissors and pipe cheese mixture into olives.'}

{'step': '3', 'description': 'Place flour in a bowl. Place egg in a separate bowl and bread crumbs in a third bowl. Coat olives first in flour, then in egg, back in flour, back in egg, and finally in bread crumbs.'}
{'step': '4', 'description': 'Place olives in the basket of the air fryer and spray the tops with cooking spray.'}
{'step': '5', 'description': 'Cook in the preheated air fryer for 8 minutes; shaking halfway through cook time.'}

air-fryer-spinach-and-mushroom-frittata.name: Air Fryer Spinach And Mushroom Frittata

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C). Spray a 4 1/2-inch ramekin with nonstick spray.
Whisk eggs and cream together in a bowl. Stir in spinach, mushrooms, Cheddar cheese, salt, and pepper until well combined. Pour into the prepared ramekin and cover tightly with foil.
Air-fry for 12 minutes. Remove foil and air-fry until top starts to brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 4 to 8 more minutes.

air-fryer-zucchini-fritters.name: Air Fryer Zucchini Fritters
instructions: Grate zucchini using large teeth of a grater. Toss zucchini with salt in a large colander placed in the sink; drain for 10 minutes.
Place zucchini in center of a piece of cheesecloth; wrap cheesecloth around zucchini and squeeze out as much liquid as possible.
Combine Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese, 3 tablespoons bread crumbs, egg, black pepper, and garlic powder in a large bowl; stir in zucchini, shallot, and jalapeño until combined.
Preheat an air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C) according to manufacturer's instructions.

Place ½ cup bread crumbs in a shallow plate or pie plate; set aside. Divide zucchini mixture into 7 equal portions; gently roll each portion into a ball using oiled hands (the mixture will be very wet). Gently roll each ball in bread crumbs to cover all sides; tap gently so excess bread crumbs fall off.
Air fry fritters, in 2 batches, until browned, about 15 minutes per batch.

ajoblanco-recipe-comedera.name: Ajoblanco Recipe

ingredients.item: 150 gr de pan duro (o en su defecto, miga de pan fresco)
1/5  de litro de aceite de oliva extra virgen
2 cucharadas grandes de vinagre de vino

instructions: We will start with crumbling the bread, if it's fresh bread, or with soaking it, if it's hard bread. In this case, it will be enough with submerging him into some cold water for a few minutes (do not abuse the amount of water. It uses only that necessary to smooth the bread).
If the almonds bring the shell, we will have to peel them (consider the weight indicated for the old almonds).

We'll get some water into a pot. When it's hot, we'll use it to scale the almonds. We can do this directly in the water for a few minutes, or better still, put the almonds in a pallet and bath them with a few tablespoons.
Later we'll let the almonds cool a little so we can remove their skin. We can help with a knife's end to do this operation.

Now we're gonna peel his garlic teeth, and then put them through a mortar and shredded them. We will also shredder the almonds with them, and we will use them to add some salt to their taste (if you have no mortar and another purple to suit, you can use a kitchen robot directly. Nevertheless, I recommend the traditional choice for better consistency).
When the above ingredients are already shredded, we will add the bread, and we will also have to chew them up.
Once we have obtained a dough from all the padded ingredients, we will start to add the oil into yarn. We'll get mixed as we're pouring the oil, to get to work with the consistency of the jewel.
We will pass the mixture to a kitchen robot or blender and we will add vinegar and finally water. Processes everything up to get the desired consistency.
Check the date of the jewel. If necessary, run and mix again.

alabama-white-sauce.name: Alabama White Sauce

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Vigorously whisk ¾ cup mayonnaise, ¼ cup buttermilk, ¼ cup distilled white vinegar, 1 Tbsp. freshly cracked pepper, 1½ tsp. dark brown sugar, 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt, ½ tsp. Dijon mustard, ½ tsp. garlic powder, ½ tsp. Worcestershire sauce, and ⅛ tsp. cayenne pepper in a small bowl until smooth. Cover and chill at least 1 hour and up to 3 days.

alcohol-free-mojitos.name: Alcohol-free Mojitos
instructions: Combine 2 cups water and the sugar in a microwave-safe bowl; heat in microwave on High for 5 minutes. Stir the mint into the water; let stand for 5 minutes. Strain and discard the mint leaves from the syrup; set aside.

Stir the lime sherbet, lime juice, and 1 cup water together in a large pitcher until well combined. Pour the mint-infused syrup into the mixture. Add club soda and stir. Serve over ice. Garnish with lime slices.

alices-turkey-day-light-rolls.name: Alice's Turkey Day Light Rolls
instructions: Stir milk, 4 1/2 tablespoons shortening, sugar, and salt together in a bowl. Cool until mixture is lukewarm.
Pour water into a bowl and sprinkle yeast over the top. Let stand until yeast softens and begins to form a creamy foam, about 5 minutes; stir. Stir milk mixture into yeast mixture until smooth.
Beat 2 1/4 cups flour into yeast mixture until smooth. Gradually stir in remaining flour until dough comes together.

Turn dough out onto a lightly floured work surface and knead until dough is smooth and elastic, about 8 minutes. Place dough in an oiled bowl, brush with melted shortening, cover the bowl with a clean towel, and set in a warm place to rise until doubled in volume, about 2 hours.
Punch dough down and form into 24 rolls. Place rolls on a lightly greased baking dish, cover with a towel, and let rise until doubled in volume, about 40 minutes.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 12 to 15 minutes.

almond-and-raspberry-swirl-ice-cream.name: Almond And Raspberry Swirl Ice Cream
instructions: Bring raspberries, sugar, and ¼ tsp. salt to a simmer in a medium saucepan over medium heat and cook, stirring often, until raspberries begin to burst and lose their shape, about 4 minutes. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a large measuring glass, pressing on solids; discard solids. Pour back into saucepan and return to medium heat. Cook, stirring occasionally, until sauce is thick enough to coat a spoon, 10–15 minutes. (You should have about 6 Tbsp.) Transfer back to measuring glass and chill until cold, about 30 minutes.
Mix condensed milk, almond extract, and remaining ¾ tsp. salt in a medium bowl to combine.
Using an electric mixer, beat cream in a medium bowl, starting on low speed and gradually increasing to medium-high as it thickens, until billowy and stiff peaks form, about 4 minutes.

Add a dollop of whipped cream to condensed milk mixture and mix in with a rubber spatula (this is just to lighten it so that the next stage—folding—is easier). Add remaining whipped cream; fold in, running spatula down sides and along bottom of bowl, then lifting up through center and over top while rotating bowl to integrate without deflating, until very few streaks of condensed milk mixture remain.

Scrape about one third of ice cream base into a loaf pan that’s at least 8½x4½". Drizzle over one third of raspberry syrup. Repeat layers 2 more times, ending with raspberry syrup (no need to be precise). Using a small offset spatula or butter knife, make figure-eight motions through ice cream base to swirl raspberry syrup throughout. Cover with plastic wrap or an airtight silicone lid and freeze until solid, at least 8 hours.
To serve, transfer loaf pan to refrigerator and let ice cream soften 10 minutes before scooping into bowls.
Do ahead: Ice cream can be made 1 week ahead. Keep frozen.

almond-rice-recipe-lezzet.name: Almond Rice Recipe

ingredients.item: 1/2 cup of water (unique, fill or iriescent)
3 cups hot chicken water or broth (can be used in hot water + 1 meat/tavuk bulyon)
1ça min of powder sugar (a mild aroma of the battery;in, optional)

You get a more aromatic and long-grained rice if you use it.
Choose an applençyou can (punch time extends).
Instead of File almonds, you can use non-stick almonds.
For different flavor, peanut (task peanut) is added.
A light sweet taste can be used in to roasted chaju.
Instead of butter, you can get a more dense aroma using simple oil (ghee).
A lighter version of olive oil can be preferred.
A small amount of cinthrobe, kakule or carn battery add a pleasant smell.
A more taste rich can be added to the bay leaf.
The interior can be enjoyed in rice style.
You can make a colorful and lightweight rice by adding fine turbulence or pumpkin.
In addition to chicken or lamb meat dishes, i&ccedil can be added to the i&ccedil of rice;in a small amount of didiked chicken meat.
You can increase the flavor using chicken water, meat water or vegetable juice.
A handle into water for a more aromatic taste can be added from bile.

instructions: 1. Pirinci is aka&ccedil in plenty of water; wash once, flows clear water until the starch goes.
2. Then leave the salty hot water for 20 minutes, undressing the edge.
3. Take butter and olive oil in the pot.
4. Savoury and roast to gold yellow color area.
5. Take aside of the juices that are excreted.
6. roast the onion in the same pan until pink.
7. You can skip this step.
8. Brass add and roast until they are transparent.
9. Add salt, pepper and sugar at this stage.
10. Add hot chicken water or broth.
11. 11. 11. 11. Bake the cover closedly until the water attracts (about 15 minutes).
12. Add roasted almonds after taking the rice cooker, blend.
12. August U close a cloth or paper towels to the car, rest for 10 minutes.

alysons-broccoli-salad.name: Alyson's Broccoli Salad
instructions: Place bacon in a large, deep skillet. Cook over medium high heat until evenly brown. Drain, crumble and set aside.

In a medium bowl, combine the broccoli, onion and raisins. In a small bowl, whisk together the vinegar, sugar and mayonnaise. Pour over broccoli mixture, and toss until well mixed. Refrigerate for at least two hours.
Before serving, toss salad with crumbled bacon and sunflower seeds.

amaretto-sour.name: Amaretto Sour
instructions: In a large cocktail shaker, combine 1 large egg white, 1 lemon twist, 1 orange twist, 4 oz. amaretto, and 2 oz. fresh lemon juice. Seal and shake vigorously without ice for 30 seconds to emulsify egg white. Unseal shaker, add ice, and shake vigorously again until shaker is well chilled. Strain into 2 stemmed coupe glasses. Dot the froth with Angostura bitters using a dropper and garnish each with a cocktail cherry on a pick, if using.

amaro-cocktail.name: Amaro Cocktail
instructions: Toast pecans, peppercorns, coriander seeds, and allspice in a small saucepan over medium heat until slightly darkened in color and fragrant, about 5 minutes. Add sugar and 1⅓ cups water and bring to a boil, stirring to dissolve sugar. Let cool and strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a heatproof measuring glass; discard solids.

Combine amaro, rye, lemon juice, and ¾ oz. orgeat in a shaker filled with ice. Shake until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds. Double-strain into a glass, then return to shaker. Add egg white, cover, and shake again until frothy, about 1 minute. Pour into a chilled coupe glass and top with a pecan.
* Raw egg is not recommended for the elderly, pregnant women, people with weakened immune systems…or people who don’t like raw egg.

an-apple-a-day.name: An Apple A Day
instructions: Melt butter in a large heavy skillet over medium heat. Add apples, brown sugar, and ginger. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean (reserve bean for another use). Cook, stirring often, until apples are just tender, about 5 minutes. Add jam, brandy, and lemon juice. Stir until liquid is reduced by half, about 3 minutes. Divide filling among ramekins. DO AHEAD Filling can be made 4 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.

Pulse almonds, flour, and powdered sugar in a food processor until almonds are finely ground. Whisk sugar and ginger in a large bowl. Using an electric mixer, add egg whites one at a time to sugar mixture, beating to blend between additions. With mixer running, gradually beat in hot melted butter. Fold in almond mixture (topping will be thin). DO AHEAD Topping can be made 1 hour ahead. Let stand at room temperature.
Preheat oven to 350°. Pour topping over filling in ramekins, dividing equally. Place ramekins on a rimmed baking sheet.
Bake until topping is puffed and tops of cakes are golden brown, 25-30 minutes. Let cool for at least 15 minutes. Serve warm, topped with a small scoop of ice cream.

anchovy-pan-lezzet.name: Anchovy Pan
instructions: 1. Extract and wash the dough.
2. Pour into a flat tray and pour the lemon juice into the water.
3. Spread corn flour.
4. Shake the tray to smear Unin fish.
5. Girl sunflower oil in frying pan.
6. Add fish and fry until it is crispy.
7. Serve hot with lemon, sliced pie, cherry tomatoes and fresh onion.

and-hake-cake-comedera.name: And Hake Cake
and-hake-cake-comedera.original_name: Pastel de merluza fácil y rápido
instructions: Comenzaremos por desmenuzar la carne de la merluza. Como lo hemos dicho antes, el pescado ya debe estar limpio de espinas y piel.
Antes de continuar, precalentaremos el horno a 180 grados.
Then we'll put an oil jet up in a pan. Once we're hot, we'll cook the crumbling hake. We'll turn the pieces to be cooked throughout the surface for five minutes.

Luego, colocaremos la merluza en una licuadora o robot de cocina, con el tomate frito y la nata. Enseguida cascaremos los huevos, y antes de mezclar el contenido con los otros ingredientes, agregaremos sal y pimienta al gusto.
We'll process all the ingredients until we get a dough as thin as we can. We have to pay attention to keeping them out.

To continue, we have to organize a Maria's bathroom in the oven. We'll place water on the plate and get a bowl to bake the cake. We will start with well grease the bottom and inner walls with some oil (can also be made with mandatillas to avoid pounding. The mold can also be sprinkled with frosted bread (as well as grease).
Now we'll put the mixture of hake into the bowl and place it in Mary's bathroom, to let it cook in the oven for 45 minutes.

After this time, we will check the cooking of the cake by performing a knife or stick test. We'll just sink him into the deeper part of the cake. Ideally, by withdrawing them, they have to get dry. If that's not the case, you can let the cake cook a little more.
When that hake cake's ready, get it out of the oven and let it cool. Then crumble and cut them into cuts, to serve.

ankara-pan-lezzet.name: Ankara Pan
instructions: 1. Firstly roasted by adding liquid oils and cities in the ceiling.
2. Cook it in the jealous fire until it will be planted and softened.
3. Taste with salt and spices.
4. Cook the chopped meat in the form of medium-sized parts into another pot and add some fat.
5. Add fine chopped onions and continue to fade.
6. Add cut peppers according to the size of the meat in the sauce.
7. Again add cut tomatoes and continue cooking.
8. Add tomato paste and salt and cook until the material softens.
9. Taste Tuzla.
10. Take the barley city you previously roasted into the serving plate and prepare the presentation by adding meat.
11. 11. You can serve Ankara pan with pepper pickles and peppers, which are very fast.
12.  Afiyet olsun.
12. August What are the Diamond Points of the Ankara Ceiling? You can cook the meat in the pots with already whistle, and at the last stage you can fry in the oven.
14 July You can increase the flavor by adding wavy and grated tomatoes into the rice prepared with the city.
15. For the absence of meat hard, add the salt latest during cooking.
16. To add a aromatic taste, you can choose a barley onions instead of normal onion.
17. September To shorten the cooking time, you can add a spoon vinegar to the broth.
18. You can taste with spices such as mint and thyme.
19. September 1 Portion Ankara Pan How Calorie?A serving of 200 grams of Ankara pan is about 205 calories.
20. This meal, which is derived from vegetables, can also be added to dietary lists.
21. The size and type of the meat you will use can vary depending on the calorie value.
22. If you wish, you can also try the recipe of maklube prepared with beef.
23. If the local dishes offered with the Turkish tour appeal to your taste, you can browse the recipe of the Black Sea, the most famous flavor, and discover new tastes.

apple-crisp-pie.name: Apple Crisp Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Make the pie: Mix apples, brown sugar, white sugar, flour, and cinnamon together in a bowl. Pour into pie shell.
Make the topping: Mix flour, oats, and 2/3 cup plus 2 tablespoons brown sugar together in a bowl. Drizzle in melted butter and stir until crumbly. Scatter over pie.

Bake in the preheated oven until apples start to soften, about 15 minutes. Reduce the oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C). Continue baking until apples are soft and topping is browned, about 40 minutes more.

apple-spice-coffee-cake.name: Apple Spice Coffee Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Butter an 8-inch glass baking dish.

Mix flour, brown sugar, oil, white sugar, 2 teaspoons cinnamon, salt, and ginger together in a large bowl until well combined. Transfer 1/2 cup flour mixture to a second bowl and stir in remaining 2 teaspoons cinnamon; set topping aside.

Whisk baking powder and baking soda into flour mixture. Beat buttermilk and egg together in a measuring cup until well combined; pour into flour mixture. Add apples; stir until just blended and no pockets of flour remain. Pour batter into the prepared pan. Sprinkle with topping.
Bake in the preheated oven until apples are tender and a toothpick inserted into the center of cake comes out clean, 40 to 50 minutes.

apple-blueberry-cobbler.name: Apple-blueberry Cobbler
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 10-inch cast-iron skillet.
Combine apples, blueberries, maple syrup, cornstarch, lemon juice, cinnamon, ½ teaspoon kosher salt, and nutmeg in a large bowl; toss to thoroughly combine. Pour into the prepared skillet.

Stir maple syrup, melted butter, and vanilla extract together in a large bowl. Add flour, baking powder, baking soda, and ½ teaspoon kosher salt; stir until crumbly. Pour in cider; stir until just combined. Dollop batter over apple-berry mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until topping is cooked through and fruit is bubbly, about 45 minutes.

arrabiata-sauce-recipe-comedera.name: Arrabiata Sauce Recipe
instructions: Warm olive oil into a medium pot at medium-high heat. Add onion and paddle for 3 minutes. Add garlic and leap for 30 more seconds.
Baja la flama a fuego medio y agrega los tomates picados, la pasta de tomate, el caldo de pollo, albahaca, perejil, las hojuelas de chile y la sal.
Deja hervir a fuego lento hasta que reduzca ligeramente, cerca de 10 minutos. Revuelve los ingredientes ocasionalmente.
Loan until the ingredients are incorporated evenly and as consistent as you wish.
Test and have more salt if necessary.
Let them cool completely before emptying the rabies sauce into an hermetic container to save in the refrigerator.

ashley-and-whitneys-yellow-squash-and-to.name: Ashley And Whitney's Yellow Squash And Tomato Packet

ingredients.item: Sheets reynolds wrap® heavy duty aluminum foil

instructions: Preheat oven to 232°C.
Place 1/4 of vegetables in center of a sheet of Reynolds Wrap® Heavy Duty Aluminum Foil. Drizzle with butter; top with basil. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.

Bring up sides of foil over vegetables; fold down two times. Double fold both ends of foil to seal packet, leaving room for heat circulation inside. Repeat to make four packets. Place packets on baking sheet with 1-inch sides.
Bake 15 to 18 minutes on the cookie sheet.
Open packets carefully by cutting beside top fold with a sharp knife, allowing steam to escape. Sprinkle 1 tablespoon Parmesan cheese over vegetables in each packet.

asturian-corn-cakes-with-minced-meat-and.name: Asturian Corn Cakes With Minced Meat And Fried Egg
asturian-corn-cakes-with-minced-meat-and.original_name: Tortos de maíz asturianos con picadillo y huevo frito

ingredients.item: 230 g early maize flour (about 1 cup and)
200 ml de agua (algo menos de 1 taza)
Abundant olive oil, sunflower or frying seeds
Un poco de sal para los huevos

instructions: We have mixed corn and wheat and salt into a bowl. We put a little with his hand or a spoonful to get him spread out.

We add water little by little, without throwing them all at once. Let's mix with his hand till a compact mass forms but something's broken. It doesn't have to be elastic as a mass of bread, but a firm plastic type, without its disposal.
Amasamos durante un par de minutos dentro del bol, solo lo justo para unir bien los ingredientes y compactar la bola.
We cover the bowl with a clean cloth or with clear film and let the dough rest an hour at room temperature. That rest is important for the mass to settle and be easier to work after.

After resting time, we heated up a good quantity of oil in a profound frying pan. It's got to be hot but without smoking, about 170-180 ″ 3 ″ if we have thermometer. While it's hot, we form the tortos.

We get mass portions as big as a big nut and give them ball shape. We put them between two oven or film paper and we smash them with a roller till they are 4-5 mm thick. It's okay if the edges aren't right, that's part of the charm.

We fry the tortos from one to one or from two to two, depending on the size of the frying pan and how much we have made the torto. When we put them into hot oil, you'll see they start bubbling at the edges and at least they start to sink as a small bubble. That's just what we want: to have gaps inside and crisps outside. The moment they have been well inflamed and have been put to sleep from the bottom, we turn them around carefully and get them cold from the other end.
When they're crispy about both sides, we get them out and we let them slip onto paper.
In the same frying pan or another if we prefer, we fry our eggs with a pint of salt. We love them with a tiptoe and a liquid yolk, but that's about to get good.

We cut the fresh choricas lengthwise with a knife and remove their gut, which is their cover skin. With our hands or with the help of a fork, let's get the meat down and get loose and not into big pieces. We put a frying pan into the fire, without adding oil (the chorizo has enough fat), and we cook the snack with medium heat, stirring from time to time, till it's well made and slightly golden. Let's have a reservation.
We ride every cake with a generous tablespoon of chorizo above and accompany them with fried egg.

atomic-cookie-lezzet.name: Atomic Cookie
instructions: 1. If required, all put the material into a wide kneading container.
2. A dough kneading in the consistency of ear nozzle by adding flour azar.
3. Give the shape to the rear inner of the lemon juice; grease the part with olive oil and cover the part you covered with stretch film.
4. Place the part of the lemon juicer in a water cup in order to stay in the area of &uuml.
5. Raw size in pieces copartuml;yeç film coated lemon juicer.
6. Make shape by pressing well with your hands.
7. Drink tribute to cube take the dry surround and a pearl bowl.
8. Add and grill dry grape and fın.
9. Dry-fruited har&ccedil from a sweet spoon to the part of the dough hollow.
10. Repeat the same process until the dough is finished.
11. 11. The cookies you prepared are indexed to the oiled paper-based oven tray.
12. Öpreheated from 175 degrees in the oven to 15-20 minutes until the car is fried.
12. August After the cold u sprinkle the sugar in the car.
